description: First Stage 1 experiment register aligned to W010 decisive experiment questions.

experiments.name: early_cutoff_benefit
experiments.question: Does verification-clean materially reduce propagation without semantic drift?

experiments.name: dynamic_topo_vs_rebuild
experiments.question: Is dynamic-topological maintenance justified relative to deterministic rebuild?

experiments.name: dynamic_dependency_economics
experiments.question: When does explicit dynamic dependency handling outperform conservative fallback?

experiments.name: overlay_retention
experiments.question: What retention policy gives useful reuse without excessive protection buildup?

experiments.name: stage2_replay_readiness
experiments.question: Is Stage 1 instrumented enough to detect concurrency-sensitive publication or retention drift before Stage 2?
